heading: Kalannie vs Kalbarri National Park — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kalannie, Western Australia and Kalbarri National Park, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kalannie and Kalbarri National Park have similar overall climate risk scores.

faq.question: Is Kalannie or Kalbarri National Park safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kalannie has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Kalbarri National Park scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kalannie scores 16/100 for bushfire risk. Kalbarri National Park scores 35/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kalannie or Kalbarri National Park?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kalannie has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.
